utterances.speaker: speaker_0
utterances.text: I want to walk you through our proposal to reallocate 20% of the marketing budget toward product-led growth. The data shows that PLG companies in our segment retain 40% better.

utterances.speaker: speaker_1
utterances.text: Why would we do that? We've built this marketing team over three years.

utterances.speaker: speaker_2
utterances.text: What evidence do you have that PLG would work in our market? Our customers aren't self-serve.

utterances.speaker: speaker_0
utterances.text: Good question. Let me show you the retention data. Companies that shifted to PLG in B2B SaaS saw net revenue retention jump from 105% to 142% within 18 months. And our own trial users — the ones who onboard themselves — activate 3x faster.

utterances.speaker: speaker_1
utterances.text: Have you considered what happens to our current marketing team during this transition? This feels risky.

utterances.speaker: speaker_2
utterances.text: Isn't 20% a big number to move all at once? That's a significant reallocation.

utterances.speaker: speaker_0
utterances.text: The reallocation would be phased over two quarters. We'd start with 8% and measure PLG-attributable pipeline before moving to the full 20%. The marketing team would shift toward product marketing and activation — roles that are higher leverage.

utterances.speaker: speaker_3
utterances.text: What does the activation workflow look like under PLG? How would users move from trial to paid?

utterances.speaker: speaker_1
utterances.text: How long would the phased transition take?

utterances.speaker: speaker_2
utterances.text: Can you explain how we'd measure whether PLG is working before committing the full 20%?

utterances.speaker: speaker_0
utterances.text: We'd track activation rate, time-to-value, and PLG-attributable pipeline weekly. If activation rate doesn't hit 35% by week 8, we pause and reassess. Clear exit criteria.

utterances.speaker: speaker_3
utterances.text: That makes sense. The phased approach with clear exit criteria addresses my concern.

utterances.speaker: speaker_1
utterances.text: I agree — the exit criteria are what I needed to hear. That's a reasonable risk management approach.

utterances.speaker: speaker_2
utterances.text: Let's move forward with the 8% pilot. What are the next steps to get this kicked off?

utterances.speaker: speaker_0
utterances.text: I'll have the implementation plan to you by Thursday. We'd need sign-off from finance and then we can start the reallocation in Q1.

utterances.speaker: speaker_3
utterances.text: Sounds good. Let's get this done.
